3032650.name: Pizza Boy Z
3032650.description:
In a world engulfed by a zombie apocalypse, one person decides not to give up and continue their daily work.
The zombie apocalypse has arrived. So what?.. But work hasn't gone anywhere.
Pizza Boy Z is 3D runner game, where you play for ordinary pizza delivery person who has become an unusual hero.
Deliver pizza to people, raiders, zombies, monsters, etc.


Features:
Zombie Delivery: The player must skillfully evade attacks and deliver orders on time.
3D world: The city is in ruins, the streets are empty, and zombies await you at every turn.
RUN mode: Overcome obstacles.
